sqlMap.sql:
FROM TB_CNG_HISTORY A WHERE 1 = 1
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_USERDEPT Z WHERE Z.USER_ID = #userId# AND Z.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND Z.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 )
AND A.CNG_TYPE = #cngType#
AND A.INDI_BNS LIKE '%' || #indiBns# || '%'
AND A.REGI_DATE BETWEEN #regiStartDate# AND ADDDATE(#regiEndDate#, 1)
sqlMap.select: /*"DialogDgrcompoCng.selectDgrCompoOriDataList"*/ SELECT FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , DEMAND_COMP_GROUND , DEMAND_COMP_FORMULAR , UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , DEPT_CD , DBIZ_CD , COMP_GROUND , COMP_FORMULAR , PRE_FORMULAR AS PRE_FORMULAR , PRE_COMP_FORMULAR , COMPO_LEVEL , A.TE_MNG_MOK_NM , A.CNG_TYPE , A.GRP_ID , A.GRP_LVL FROM TB_DGRCOMPO_ORI A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.GRP_ID = #cngHistoryId# ORDER BY A.GRP_LVL

/*DialogDgrcompoCng.selectDgrcompoOri*/ SELECT FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , DEMAND_COMP_GROUND , DEMAND_COMP_FORMULAR , UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , NVL((SELECT Z.FIS_FG_NM FROM TB_YEARFISFG Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.FIS_FG_CD = (SELECT Z.FIS_FG_CD FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1) AND ROWNUM = 1), '') || '-' || NVL((SELECT Z.OFFICE_NM FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') || '-' || NVL((SELECT Z.DEPT_NM FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') || '-' || NVL((SELECT Z.DBIZ_NM FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') || '-' || COMP_GROUND AS TITLE , DEPT_CD , DBIZ_CD , CAST((A.DEMAND_BGT_AMT/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DEMAND_BGT_AMT , CAST((A.DEMAND_DIFF_AMT/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DEMAND_DIFF_AMT , COMP_GROUND , COMP_FORMULAR , CAST((A.BGT_AMT/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS BGT_AMT , PRE_FORMULAR AS PRE_FORMULAR , CAST((A.PRE_AMT/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_AMT , CAST((A.DIFF_AMT/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DIFF_AMT , PRE_COMP_FORMULAR , CAST((A.PRE_BGT_AMT/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_BGT_AMT , COMPO_LEVEL , NVL((SELECT CAST((Z.PRE_AMT/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_AMT FROM TB_DGRCOMPO Z WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID ) , 0) AS UP_PRE_AMT , NVL((SELECT Z.DBIZ_NM FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') || '-' || '(' || DECODE(A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, NULL, '', '00000', '', SUBSTR(A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, 1, 3) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, 4)) || ')' || NVL((SELECT Z.TE_MNG_MOK_NM FROM TB_DGRTEMNGMOK Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_MNG_MOK_CD = A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS DGRCOMPO_NM , (SELECT Z.DBIZ_NM FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1) AS UP_DGRCOMPO_NM , DECODE(A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, NULL, '', '00000', '', SUBSTR(A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, 1, 3) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, 4)) AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD , A.TE_MNG_MOK_NM FROM TB_DGRCOMPO_ORI A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId# AND A.CNG_HISTORY_ID = #cngHistoryId# ORDER BY A.GRP_LVL, A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID

/*DialogDgrcompoCng.selectDgrcompofrscList*/ SELECT #fisYear# AS FIS_YEAR , #bgtDgr# AS BGT_DGR , #teBgtCompoId# AS TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , A.FRSC_FG_CD AS FRSC_FG_CD , A.FRSC_FG_NM AS FRSC_FG_NM , A.STAND_FRSC_CD AS STAND_FRSC_CD , CAST((NVL(B.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT , CAST((NVL(B.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT , CAST((NVL(B.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT , CAST(((NVL(B.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0) + NVL(B.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0))/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DEMAND_FRSC_AMT , CAST(((NVL(B.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0) + NVL(B.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0))/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT , CAST((NVL(B.PRE_FRSC_AMT, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT FROM TB_YEARFRSC A , (SELECT BB.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , BB.FRSC_FG_CD AS FRSC_FG_CD , BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT , BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT AS ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT , BB.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT , BB.PRE_FRSC_AMT AS PRE_FRSC_AMT FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC_ORI BB WHERE 1 = 1 AND BB.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BB.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId# AND BB.CNG_HISTORY_ID = #cngHistoryId# ) B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.FIS_YEAR = B.FIS_YEAR(+) AND A.FRSC_FG_CD = B.FRSC_FG_CD(+) AND A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# ORDER BY A.FRSC_FG_CD

/*DialogDgrcompoCng.selectDgrcompocharList*/ SELECT #fisYear# AS FIS_YEAR , #bgtDgr# AS BGT_DGR , #teBgtCompoId# AS TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , A.DETL_CD AS CHAR_FG_CD , A.DETL_CD_NM AS CHAR_FG_NM , CAST((NVL(B.DMN_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_DEF_CHAR_AMT , CAST((NVL(B.ADJ_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS ADJ_DEF_CHAR_AMT , CAST((NVL(B.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT , CAST(((NVL(B.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0) + NVL(B.DMN_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0))/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DEMAND_CHAR_AMT , CAST(((NVL(B.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0) + NVL(B.ADJ_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0))/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS CHAR_AMT , CAST((NVL(B.PRE_CHAR_AMT, 0)/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS PRE_CHAR_AMT FROM TB_COMMCDDETL A , (SELECT BB.CHAR_FG_CD AS CHAR_FG_CD , BB.DMN_DEF_CHAR_AMT AS DMN_DEF_CHAR_AMT , BB.ADJ_DEF_CHAR_AMT AS ADJ_DEF_CHAR_AMT , BB.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT , BB.PRE_CHAR_AMT AS PRE_CHAR_AMT FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR_ORI BB WHERE 1 = 1 AND BB.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BB.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId# AND BB.CNG_HISTORY_ID = #cngHistoryId# ) B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DETL_CD = B.CHAR_FG_CD(+) AND A.CL_CD = 'DC001' ORDER BY A.DETL_CD
sqlMap.insert: /* DialogDgrcompoCng.insertCngHistory */ INSERT INTO TB_CNG_HISTORY ( CNG_HISTORY_ID , CNG_TYPE , TITLE , INDI_BNS , NOTE , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE , MODI_ID , MODI_DATE) VALUES( #cngHistoryId# , #cngType# , #title# , #indiBns# , #note# , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP)
sqlMap.update:
/*DialogDgrcompoCng.updateDgrCompoChild*/ UPDATE TB_DGRCOMPO A SET CNG_TYPE = #cngType# , GRP_ID = #grpId# , GRP_LVL = #grpLvl# , MODI_ID = #userId# , MODI_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID IN
#oriDatas[]#
sqlMap.insert: /*DialogDgrcompoCng.insertDgrCompoOriChild*/ INSERT INTO TB_DGRCOMPO_ORI ( FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , CNG_HISTORY_ID , DEPT_CD , DBIZ_CD , TE_MNG_MOK_CD , TE_MNG_MOK_NM , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , DEMAND_COMPO_SORT_SEQ , DEMAND_COMPO_LEVEL , DEMAND_COMP_GROUND , DEMAND_COMP_FORMULAR , DEMAND_BGT_AMT , DEMAND_DIFF_AMT , DEMAND_COMPO_LEVEL_AMT , DEMAND_FORM_DSP_YN , COMPO_SORT_SEQ , COMPO_LEVEL , COMP_GROUND , COMP_FORMULAR , BGT_AMT , PRE_FORMULAR , PRE_AMT , DIFF_AMT , COMPO_LEVEL_AMT , FORM_DSP_YN , UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , SORT_SEQ , PRE_COMP_FORMULAR , PRE_BGT_AMT , CNG_TYPE , GRP_ID , GRP_LVL , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE , MODI_ID , MODI_DATE) SELECT TD1.FIS_YEAR , TD1.BGT_DGR , TD1.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , #cngHistoryId# AS CNG_HISTORY_ID , TD1.DEPT_CD , TD1.DBIZ_CD , TD1.TE_MNG_MOK_CD , TD1.TE_MNG_MOK_NM , TD1.TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , TD1.DEMAND_COMPO_SORT_SEQ , TD1.DEMAND_COMPO_LEVEL , TD1.DEMAND_COMP_GROUND , TD1.DEMAND_COMP_FORMULAR , TD1.DEMAND_BGT_AMT , TD1.DEMAND_DIFF_AMT , TD1.DEMAND_COMPO_LEVEL_AMT , TD1.DEMAND_FORM_DSP_YN , TD1.COMPO_SORT_SEQ , TD1.COMPO_LEVEL , TD1.COMP_GROUND , TD1.COMP_FORMULAR , TD1.BGT_AMT , TD1.PRE_FORMULAR , TD1.PRE_AMT , TD1.DIFF_AMT , TD1.COMPO_LEVEL_AMT , TD1.FORM_DSP_YN , TD1.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , TD1.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , TD1.SORT_SEQ , TD1.PRE_COMP_FORMULAR , TD1.PRE_BGT_AMT , TD1.CNG_TYPE , TD1.GRP_ID , TD1.GRP_LVL , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP FROM TB_DGRCOMPO TD1 WHERE TD1.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TD1.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND TD1.GRP_ID = #cngHistoryId#

/*DialogDgrcompoCng.insertDgrCompoFrscOriChild*/ INSERT INTO TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC_ORI ( FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , FRSC_FG_CD , CNG_HISTORY_ID , DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT , ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT , PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT , PRE_FRSC_AMT , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE , MODI_ID , MODI_DATE) SELECT TD1.FIS_YEAR , TD1.BGT_DGR , TD1.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , TD1.FRSC_FG_CD , #cngHistoryId# AS CNG_HISTORY_ID , TD1.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT , TD1.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT , TD1.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT , TD1.PRE_FRSC_AMT , TD1.TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC TD1 WHERE TD1.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TD1.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND TD1.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID IN (SELECT TE_BGT_COMPO_ID FROM TB_DGRCOMPO WHERE GRP_ID = #cngHistoryId# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear#)

/*DialogDgrcompoCng.insertDgrCompoCharOriChild*/ INSERT INTO TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR_ORI ( FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , CHAR_FG_CD , CNG_HISTORY_ID , DMN_DEF_CHAR_AMT , ADJ_DEF_CHAR_AMT , PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT , PRE_CHAR_AMT , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE , MODI_ID , MODI_DATE) SELECT TD1.FIS_YEAR , TD1.BGT_DGR , TD1.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , TD1.CHAR_FG_CD , #cngHistoryId# AS CNG_HISTORY_ID , TD1.DMN_DEF_CHAR_AMT , TD1.ADJ_DEF_CHAR_AMT , TD1.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT , TD1.PRE_CHAR_AMT , TD1.TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR TD1 WHERE TD1.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TD1.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND TD1.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID IN (SELECT TE_BGT_COMPO_ID FROM TB_DGRCOMPO WHERE GRP_ID = #cngHistoryId# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear#)
sqlMap.update: /*DialogDgrcompoCng.updateDgrCompoData*/ UPDATE TB_DGRCOMPO A SET CNG_TYPE = #cngType# , GRP_ID = #grpId# , GRP_LVL = #grpLvl# , MODI_ID = #userId# , MODI_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#
sqlMap.insert: /*DialogDgrcompoCng.insertDgrCompoMergeDataH*/ INSERT INTO TB_DGRCOMPO_H( FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , HIS_SEQ , HIS_FG , DEPT_CD , DBIZ_CD , TE_MNG_MOK_CD , TE_MNG_MOK_NM , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , DEMAND_COMPO_SORT_SEQ , DEMAND_COMPO_LEVEL , DEMAND_COMP_GROUND , DEMAND_COMP_FORMULAR , DEMAND_BGT_AMT , DEMAND_DIFF_AMT , DEMAND_COMPO_LEVEL_AMT , DEMAND_FORM_DSP_YN , COMPO_SORT_SEQ , COMPO_LEVEL , COMP_GROUND , COMP_FORMULAR , BGT_AMT , PRE_FORMULAR , PRE_AMT , DIFF_AMT , COMPO_LEVEL_AMT , FORM_DSP_YN , UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , SORT_SEQ , PRE_COMP_FORMULAR , PRE_BGT_AMT , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE) SELECT FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , (SELECT NVL(MAX(HIS_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM TB_DGRCOMPO_H Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS HIS_SEQ , #hisFg# , DEPT_CD , DBIZ_CD , TE_MNG_MOK_CD , TE_MNG_MOK_NM , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , DEMAND_COMPO_SORT_SEQ , DEMAND_COMPO_LEVEL , DEMAND_COMP_GROUND , DEMAND_COMP_FORMULAR , DEMAND_BGT_AMT , DEMAND_DIFF_AMT , DEMAND_COMPO_LEVEL_AMT , DEMAND_FORM_DSP_YN , COMPO_SORT_SEQ , COMPO_LEVEL , COMP_GROUND , COMP_FORMULAR , BGT_AMT , PRE_FORMULAR , PRE_AMT , DIFF_AMT , COMPO_LEVEL_AMT , FORM_DSP_YN , UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , SORT_SEQ , PRE_COMP_FORMULAR , PRE_BGT_AMT , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A WHERE 1 = 1 AND GRP_ID = #cngHistoryId# AND GRP_LVL = '1'
sqlMap.update: /*DialogDgrcompoCng.updateDgrCompoMergeData*/ UPDATE TB_DGRCOMPO A SET (DEMAND_BGT_AMT , DEMAND_DIFF_AMT , DEMAND_COMPO_LEVEL_AMT , BGT_AMT , PRE_AMT , DIFF_AMT , COMPO_LEVEL_AMT , PRE_BGT_AMT ) = (SELECT SUM(DEMAND_BGT_AMT) AS DEMAND_BGT_AMT , SUM(DEMAND_DIFF_AMT) AS DEMAND_DIFF_AMT , SUM(DEMAND_COMPO_LEVEL_AMT) AS DEMAND_COMPO_LEVEL_AMT , SUM(BGT_AMT) AS BGT_AMT , SUM(PRE_AMT) AS PRE_AMT , SUM(DIFF_AMT) AS DIFF_AMT , SUM(COMPO_LEVEL_AMT) AS COMPO_LEVEL_AMT , SUM(PRE_BGT_AMT) AS PRE_BGT_AMT FROM TB_DGRCOMPO WHERE GRP_ID = #cngHistoryId# AND GRP_LVL = '2' ) WHERE GRP_ID = #cngHistoryId# AND GRP_LVL = '1'

/*DialogDgrcompoCng.updateDgrCompoFrscMergeData*/ UPDATE TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC A SET (A.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT , A.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT , A.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT , A.PRE_FRSC_AMT ) = (SELECT SUM(B.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT) AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT , SUM(B.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT) AS ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT , SUM(B.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT , SUM(B.PRE_FRSC_AMT) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC B WHERE B.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND B.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND B.FRSC_FG_CD = A.FRSC_FG_CD AND B.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID IN (SELECT C.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID FROM TB_DGRCOMPO C WHERE C.GRP_ID = #cngHistoryId# AND C.GRP_LVL = '2') ) WHERE A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID IN (SELECT C.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID FROM TB_DGRCOMPO C WHERE C.GRP_ID = #cngHistoryId# AND C.GRP_LVL = '1')

/*DialogDgrcompoCng.updateDgrCompoCharMergeData*/ UPDATE TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR A SET (A.DMN_DEF_CHAR_AMT , A.ADJ_DEF_CHAR_AMT , A.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT , A.PRE_CHAR_AMT ) = (SELECT SUM(B.DMN_DEF_CHAR_AMT) AS DMN_DEF_CHAR_AMT , SUM(B.ADJ_DEF_CHAR_AMT) AS ADJ_DEF_CHAR_AMT , SUM(B.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT , SUM(B.PRE_CHAR_AMT) AS PRE_CHAR_AMT FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR B WHERE B.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND B.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND B.CHAR_FG_CD = A.CHAR_FG_CD AND B.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID IN (SELECT C.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID FROM TB_DGRCOMPO C WHERE C.GRP_ID = #cngHistoryId# AND C.GRP_LVL = '2') ) WHERE A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID IN (SELECT C.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID FROM TB_DGRCOMPO C WHERE C.GRP_ID = #cngHistoryId# AND C.GRP_LVL = '1')
